description.p: GradientConic draws colour values around a centre point, producing a conic gradient.

field.name: CenterX
field.comment: The horizontal centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CenterX, CenterY) coordinates define the centre point around which the conic gradient rotates. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.

field.name: CenterY
field.comment: The vertical centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CenterX, CenterY) coordinates define the centre point around which the conic gradient rotates. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.

field.name: Flags
field.comment: Dimension flags for conic gradient fields.

description.p: Dimension flags indicate whether conic coordinate fields are fixed or scaled.
The radius of the conic gradient can be defined as a fixed unit or scaled relative to its container. A default radius of 50% applies if this field is not set.
